original: 哲学家(00:25:21): Maybe reading maybe anything else?Yeah, but to have in your mind what you want to do with your life, otherwise you know what's gonna happen all your life.You will just survive, yes, and not so happy and survive.And then when you die, you say what was this all about?
translation: 哲学家(00:25:21): 也许是阅读 也许是其他事情？是的 但要在心里清楚你这一生想做什么 否则你知道会发生什么。你只是活着 是的 并不那么快乐地活着。然后当你死去时 你会说这一切都是为了什么？
